name: Northern Minerals & Exploration Ltd.
summary: Northern Minerals & Exploration Ltd. operates as a natural resource company in the United States. It produces oil and gas in central Texas; and explores for gold and silver in northern Nevada. The company has interest in the J.E. Richey lease located in Coleman County, Texas. It is also involved in hotel & resort development activities. The company was formerly known as Punchline Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Northern Minerals & Exploration Ltd. in August 2013. Northern Minerals & Exploration Ltd. was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Salt Lake City, Utah.
